subject: HERE GOES
body:
.  Leaving tonight .Fine - maybe a reason you didn't marry . 
I am simply soooooooooooooo nervous - next to what is maybe= panic  attack .  
Took a xanan from my dog  and now i'm calmer but  dittzier.
Only worried (only ???)  about the surgery and return which  bruce booked too 
early. Don't like being away from comfort of home all together  yet in agony.
+Yes - know it needs to get done - have to miss NY  meeting  but so anxious 
to feel GOOD.
All I seem to do is cry and nothing is even sounding good.  So  there - 
stilll my friend and what ?
or willl you abandon me too.    Y(yes , i'm  shitty    right now.)
We have our cells if you  want.
 
Marcia M.



**************Need a new ride? Check out the largest site for U.S. used car 
listings at AOL Autos.      
(http://autos.aol.com/used?NCID=aolcmp00300000002851)
